caption: A screen recording shows a web browser window open to a digital learning platform. The page displays a dark background with a conceptual map containing several interconnected circular nodes and a white rectangular text box containing a list of items. In the top right corner of the browser, a small video feed shows a man with light skin, wearing a dark shirt and a blue baseball cap, speaking. The browser tabs at the top include titles such as "True & Learning by Systemen...", "Elements by Systemen...", and "Future of Society by Systemen...". To the left of the content area, a sidebar contains a search bar and the text "Blackboard shell learning". Throughout the sequence, the visual elements of the conceptual map and the layout of the browser window remain static, while the man in the video feed continues to speak, with slight shifts in his facial expression and posture.
